questions.question_text_full: What is the long lasting damage that the bush fires have caused to the wildlife in Australia?

options.text: The fires have not only killed animals directly, but also destroyed their habitat.
Many animals in the zoos have been killed.
Half a billion animals have died in New South Wales alone.
More than 100,000 cows and sheep may have been lost.

questions.correct_option_text: The fires have not only killed animals directly, but also destroyed their habitat.
